occupation: Marketing & Sales Director at Global Nederland
headline: Marketing & Sales Director at Global Media & Entertainment BV

experiences.title: Marketing & business development director
experiences.description: Responsible for the marketing and communication team; events, brand, BRO, research and insights and working close with the sales teams to develop and implement our outdoor packages with a focus on engaging audiences. Business Development is an essential part of our new profile and innovative approach towards outdoor advertising. We are constantly looking at new developments and we try to unlock these for our advertisers and keep our lead when it comes to interactivity and innovation within our industry.

experiences.title: Owner
experiences.description: With Stamppot I invest in companies/projects and/or actively participate in a company to get a business started or to grow in a short period of time. (e.g. moviq, www.babboe.com, www.beick.com, mobile tail, top10). I am an allrounder with a strong background in finance and marketing/sales and last 5 years most projects were online related. Extensive experience with setting up new business, websites, social media,e-commerce, seo/sea, cross media, interactive.

experiences.title: COO
experiences.description: Shareholder and management position to make Babboe the worldwide marketleader in cargo bikes and set up the new and innovative bike brand 'Beick'. Both companies are very succesfull within the niche market of bikes worldwide, currently active in over more then 10 countries.

experiences.title: CEO / COO
experiences.description: Moviq is a vertical platform built around everything that has to do with housing. We have started and built the company together with investors and shareholders (Talpa Holding and Rabobank). Since march 2008 Moviq is live and has grown progressively towards a number 2 position. As of may 2009 Moviq is sold to a group of investors.

experiences.title: Marketing manager
experiences.description: Leading a group of marketeers (+10) for the SME market in the Netherlands. Branding, online, offline, products and special events.

experiences.title: Account manager Corporate Clients
experiences.description: Na management traineeship (11 maanden) 2 jaar werkzaam geweest als PA. Daarna als account manager werkzaam geweest voor grotere nederlandse bedrijven (corporate clients) met als specialisme kredietverlening.

education.school: HU University of Applied Sciences Utrecht (Hogeschool Utrecht)
